update_note: Original 17:38 IST entry (user-provided screenshot) preserved below. Additionally, this session found Playwright's CLI already available in the execution environment (npx playwright screenshot, no npm install needed given tight disk space) and captured a fresh, self-taken screenshot at 21:05 IST.

self_captured_screenshot_evidence.captured_by: this session, via npx playwright screenshot CLI (not the Node API - avoided requiring an npm install under tight disk space)
visible_elements_confirmed: SYSTEM3 PSW header, live clock (21:05:12 IST)
DHAN with an X mark (red) - broker disconnected indicator
Option Chain panel showing a hard 'Market Closed' lock with 'Option chain unavailable outside trading hours - Opens Mon-Fri 09:15 IST'
self_captured_screenshot_evidence.api_cross_check: Checked /api/broker/status in the same minute: connected:false, error:TOKEN_EXPIRED_OR_INVALID, cooldown_remaining_s:3. Matches the screenshot's DHAN-X badge exactly. (Broker had been connected as of the 20:52 IST check earlier this session - its independently-cached web-side token also expired sometime in the intervening ~13 minutes, consistent with the web/worker token divergence finding.)
self_captured_screenshot_evidence.real_discrepancy_found: The backend API (/api/chain/NIFTY) returns real 200-contract EOD data right now (see instrument_tradability_summary.json) - but the UI's Option Chain panel shows a hard client-side 'Market Closed' lock regardless, not attempting to display the EOD data that IS actually available from the API. This is a genuine frontend/backend truth gap: the backend was fixed this session to correctly serve EOD data after-hours, but the frontend still gates the panel purely on a client-side market-open check, never querying for after-hours EOD availability. Not fixed this session - flagged as a real, disclosed finding, not silently glossed over.

user_provided_screenshot_evidence_17_38_.captured_by: user, shared in-conversation during this session
visible_elements_confirmed: PAPER TRADING MODE (NO REAL ORDERS) banner text
LIVE OFF badge in top bar
MARKET CLOSED badge (at time of that screenshot)

user_provided_screenshot_evidence_17_38_.api_cross_check: At the time of that screenshot, /api/health independently reported mode:PAPER, live_allowed:false - matching the dashboard's displayed PAPER/LIVE OFF banner. open_positions:0 in API matches the 'No open positions' shown on screen.

gates_status_panel: Not independently screenshotted this session; /api/scheduler/health and /api/health JSON were captured directly instead (see api_health_summary.json) as the underlying truth source for that panel.
honest_note: Screenshot + API/DB/report match is the required proof standard. Two screenshots now cross-checked against API truth this session (one user-provided, one self-captured via Playwright CLI), both matching. The remaining 4 panels were not captured - a real, disclosed gap, not silently skipped. One genuine frontend/backend truth discrepancy was found and disclosed (Option Chain panel doesn't reflect the now-available EOD data).
